name: RADCOM ACE
description: Cloud-native passive probe and analytics platform for 5G SA core and RAN. Provides per-subscriber experience visibility from network-side traffic analysis.
howItWorks: RADCOM ACE taps into 5G core interfaces (N1/N2/N3/N6) and performs deep packet inspection to reconstruct individual subscriber sessions. It correlates network telemetry with subscriber identity and ARPU data from BSS, enabling per-subscriber experience scoring without active test traffic.
